---
id: cancel-payment
title: "Cancel payment"
description: "Cancel specific unprocessed payment order."
sidebar_label: "Cancel payment"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/api-psd2/home-credit-psd-2-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Cancel payment"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/my/contracts/{contractNumber}/payments/{paymentId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Cancel specific unprocessed payment order.

Possible error codes explanation:
| Error status code | Code         | Explanation                           |
| --- | ---                        | ---                                   |
| 404 | RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND         | Resource could not be found           |
| 422 | NOT_ALLOWED                | Cancelation of payment is not allowed |
| 500 | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR      | Internal failure                      |

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"contractNumber","in":"path","description":"Payment related contract number","required":true,"example":"3700227718","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"paymentId","in":"path","description":"Payment relevant account move ID","required":true,"example":"A123456789","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json; charset=utf-8":{"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"smsAuthorization":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Payment verification key (it is known only to application)"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"Payment OTP - code sent through SMS"}},"required":["key","code"],"description":"Authorization info for SMS (OTP) authorization type"}},"required":["smsAuthorization"],"example":{"smsAuthorization":{"key":"011173bc-13d8-4467-a096-b8680b122fc3","code":"12345"}}},{"type":"object","properties":{"smsAuthorization":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Payment verification key (it is known only to application)"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"Payment OTP - code sent through SMS"}},"required":["key","code"],"description":"Authorization info for SMS (OTP) authorization type"}},"required":["smsAuthorization"],"example":{"smsAuthorization":{"key":"011173bc-13d8-4467-a096-b8680b122fc3","code":"12345"}}}]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["paymentId"],"properties":{"paymentId":{"type":"string","example":"A11223344","description":"Payment ID"}},"title":"Payment"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"paymentId":"A11223344"}}}}}},"404":{"description":"Not Found","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["errors"],"properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["code","message","severity"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","example":"ERR_1000_SOME_ERROR_CODE","description":"unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","example":"Some error/validation message description","description":"human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","example":"personalBirthNumber","description":"json path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","example":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4","description":"internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"title":"Error"}}},"title":"Errors"},{"type":"object","properties":{"authorization":{"type":"object","properties":{"blockedUntil":{"type":"string","example":"2017-01-18T10:34:44+01:00","description":"requested operation is blocked until specified time"}},"title":"Authorization"}}}]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"ERR_1000_SOME_ERROR_CODE","message":"Some error/validation message description","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"personalBirthNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}],"authorization":{"blockedUntil":"2017-01-18T10:34:44+01:00"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
